name: nukemcp
description: Inspect and control a running Nuke 17 session
long_description:
NukeMCP gives Claude tools to inspect and control a running Nuke 17 session: query and edit the node graph, render, take screenshots, save/open scripts, and run arbitrary Python inside Nuke.

This extension installs the standalone MCP server only. A separate addon must also be installed inside Nuke itself -- add the NukeMCP repo's `nuke_addon/` directory to your `NUKE_PATH` and start Nuke. See the repo's docs/INSTALL.md for the full addon setup step; without it running, every tool will report a clear connection error.

nuke_host.title: Nuke addon host
nuke_host.description: Host the NukeMCP Nuke addon is listening on. Leave as default unless you changed NUKEMCP_HOST on the addon side.

nuke_port.title: Nuke addon port
nuke_port.description: Port the NukeMCP Nuke addon is listening on. Leave as default unless you changed NUKEMCP_PORT on the addon side.
